response: Wilmington International Airport is closer to the Atlantic Ocean than Texarkana Regional Airport. Wilmington International Airport is located just north of Wilmington, North Carolina, and is five miles (8 km) south of Wilmington, which is near the Atlantic coast. Texarkana Regional Airport, on the other hand, is located three nautical miles (6 km) northeast of Texarkana, Arkansas, which is further inland and not near the Atlantic Ocean.
